name: HCA Healthcare, Inc.
description: HCA Healthcare, Inc. is one of the largest healthcare services providers in the United States, operating general, acute care hospitals, psychiatric hospitals, rehabilitation hospitals, and numerous outpatient facilities. Founded in 1968 and headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, the company is committed to the care and improvement of human life, leveraging its scale and clinical data to advance medical practices and patient care across its extensive network of facilities.
